page: Microsoft Azure EC64eds_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECEDV5 family. It is powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 64 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) paired with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 2891 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. There are no graphics processing units (GPUs) bundled with this instance, and it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC64eds_v5 offers a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it a strong qualitative match for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Given the 512.0 GB RAM capacity and substantial local storage, this instance is designed for large-scale databases, memory-intensive data processing, enterprise applications, and workloads requiring high-capacity local scratch space.
description: Microsoft Azure EC64eds_v5 is a memory-optimized server instance from the ECEDV5 family, running on the x86_64 architecture via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel processor featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per vCPU memory allocation. The instance includes 2891 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for resource-dense environments, the EC64eds_v5 provides a balanced framework for memory-heavy operations without the overhead of accelerator hardware. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing workloads that benefit from substantial local storage capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64eds_v5 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512.0 GB of RAM, and 2891 GB of local storage, designed for large databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC64eds_v5 is a memory-optimized instance with 64 Intel vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2891 GB local storage running on Hyper-V.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring sixty-four dedicated cores, half a terabyte of RAM, and high-capacity local storage for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
2891 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for large-scale databases and memory-intensive enterprise workloads
